title: Reflex
description: Reflex brings modern FPS-style combat feedback to Minecraft, directional damage indicators, near-miss warnings, and hit effects that make every fight more readable and intense. Pure client-side, works on any server, no mods required on the other end.
body:
# Reflex

Reflex is a lightweight directional awareness mod for Minecraft (`26.1.x`) on Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge.
It shows short arc indicators around your crosshair so you can quickly tell where danger or important nearby events are coming from.

## Core Features

- **Damage Direction**: Shows where attacks came from.
- **Near-Miss Warnings**: Shows direction when projectiles fly close but miss.
- **Noise Awareness**: Shows direction for configured sound categories.
- **Per-Category Colors**: Customize indicator colors for each configured category.
- **Cross-Loader Support**: Shared behavior across Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge.

## Indicator Categories

Reflex supports category-based toggles for both noise and combat:

- `World`
- `Entity`
- `Other Player`

You can enable/disable each category independently and set custom colors.

## Near-Miss Options

Near-miss indicators are configurable with dedicated controls:

- **Near-Miss Indicator**: Turn near-miss arcs on/off.
- **Near-Miss Color**: Set a separate color just for near-miss arcs.
- **Near-Miss Source**:
  - `Projectile`: Arc points from projectile position.
  - `Shooter`: Arc points from the projectile owner (if available).

## Combat Position Mode

Choose how combat indicators track attackers:

- `Past`: Uses the attacker position at the moment of hit.
- `Current`: Tracks attacker current position while indicator is active.

## Size and Visual Tuning

Reflex includes visual scaling controls:

- **Indicator Width**
- **Indicator Length**

Defaults are `100%` and can be adjusted in the size settings screen.

## Menu / Configuration

Open the configuration menu with the client command:

- `/reflex`

The menu includes:

- Category toggles for noise/combat
- Per-category color buttons
- Near-miss toggle and color
- Ignore own sounds toggle
- Combat location mode
- Size settings entry
- Reset defaults

## Loader Notes

- Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge builds are supported.
- Configuration is stored in the mod config directory as a JSON file.

## Version Scope

This setup targets Minecraft `26.1.x` with the versions defined in `gradle.properties`.
